hero.badge: Works on any phone — app, SMS
hero.subtitle: OjàFarm connects small-scale Nigerian farmers directly with input suppliers, aggregators and buyers — sell for more, buy for less, grow with confidence.

why.label: Why OjàFarm
why.heading: Real problems small-scale farmers face — and how we fix them

items.solution: Direct connection to verified buyers and aggregators near you.
Weather and crop-price alerts tailored to what you grow.
Cooperative pricing and bulk-order tools that lift your leverage.

how.label: How it works
how.heading: From sign-up to a stronger business in four steps

items.title: Sign up
items.detail: Create an account as a farmer or supplier in minutes.

items.title: Browse or list
items.detail: See live prices, or list your products for buyers to find.

items.title: Connect directly
items.detail: Reach the other side by phone or SMS — no middlemen.

items.title: Grow
items.detail: Sell for more, buy for less, and build a track record.

features.label: Features
features.heading: Everything you need in one place

items.title: Crop price updates
items.detail: Daily commodity prices for cassava, maize, oil palm and rice.

items.title: Local weather alerts
items.detail: Five-day rainfall and temperature forecasts for your region.

items.title: Farming advisories
items.detail: Guidance tied to the crop calendar and pest pressure.

items.title: Cooperative groups
items.detail: Coordinate inputs, storage and bulk sales with your peers.

items.title: Direct contact
items.detail: Call suppliers and buyers straight from every listing.

items.title: Ratings & reviews
items.detail: Trade with confidence using transparent supplier ratings.

stories.label: Stories
stories.heading: Trusted by farmers and traders across Nigeria

items.quote: I now sell my cassava to a processor directly. My income is up and I skip the middlemen.
Price alerts tell me exactly when to hold my grain. Last season that alone paid off.
The cooperative tools let our group share a digester and market oil together.

cta.heading: Ready to grow?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of farmers and suppliers trading smarter on OjàFarm. Signing up is free and works on any phone.

footer.tagline: Connecting Nigerian farmers with input suppliers, aggregators, and buyers.
